rationale: Large 66-file YApi frontend rebase combining API standardization with UI polish, matching the Chinese PR body. The `vendors/client/api/` directory gets 10 standardized API modules (`col.js`, `follow.js`, `group.js`, `index.js`, `interface.js`, `log.js`, `paths.js`, `plugin.js`, `project.js`, `user.js`) including the new `fetchMyGroup` referenced in the PR body. `vendors/client/layout/Layout.jsx` adjusts the login-check effect to close the Loading state when finished and fixes Chrome detection. `Header.jsx` + `Header.module.scss` reorganize into a Flex toolbar with adaptive breadcrumbs and the unified `getUserAvatarUrl` helper. `Footer.jsx` + `Footer.module.scss` sync version info with `package`. Page-level changes touch `Home`, `Group` (`lg` breakpoint side-bar collapse), `Interface` (collapsible side-bar + responsive SCSS), `Login` (mobile height/padding). Global SCSS mixin (`g-row`) drops `min-width` at narrow widths. `index.jsx`, `Postman/Postman.jsx`, `TimeLine/TimeLine.jsx`, `UsernameAutoComplete/UsernameAutoComplete.jsx`, and `Search/Search.jsx` round out the polish. Coherent UI/API consolidation; no logic stubs, no removed assertions, no cheat surface.
